welcome.title: Customer Management
welcome.description: This is where you manage your customer database. You can create, edit, search, and export customer information.

header.title: Customer Actions
header.description:
From here you can:

Create individual customers
Bulk import customers from Excel

Administrators have access to all options.

search.title: Quick Search
search.description:
Search customers by name, email, or tax ID.

Results filter in real-time as you type.

table.title: Customers Table
table.description:
Complete list of your customers with name, contact info, tax ID, address, and registration date.

Click the edit button to update a customer's information.

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description: You now know the customer management tools. Keeping your database up to date will help you better manage your sales and leads.
